allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
docs\(claude\): improve documentation navigation and discoverability

Add comprehensive documentation navigation system with master index,
task-based quick start guide, and complete cross-referencing.

New files:
- INDEX.md: Master documentation index listing all 18 files
- SCENARIOS.md: Task-based guide \("I want to do X, read Y"\)
- settings-hooks.md: Configuration documentation for permissions/hooks

Updates:
- README.md: Add navigation links, fix "2 rules" → "8 rules"
- CLAUDE.md: Add navigation section, reduce duplication
- All 8 rule files: Add scope labels and cross-references
- All 7 agent files: Add scope/read-when frontmatter and footers
- release.md: Add scope and expanded references

Improvements:
- Remove duplicated release workflow from versioning.md
- Add critical warning box to mantine-dark-mode.md
- Create ~30 cross-references between related files
- Document all permissions and hooks in settings.local.json

Impact: +943 lines added, -13 lines removed \(duplication\)
Files updated: 21 total \(3 new, 18 updated\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
